task_completion.description: Create the central Top Event, Threats, and Prevention Barriers
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the first page of diagrams.net, there should be a central orange shape (Top Event), 5 red shapes (Threats), and 5 blue shapes (Prevention Barriers).

task_completion.description: Create the Consequences and Mitigation Barriers
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the first page of diagrams.net, there should be 5 dark red shapes (Consequences) and 5 green shapes (Mitigation Barriers) arranged on the right side of the Top Event.

task_completion.description: Connect the shapes with arrows and label them
task_completion.visual_evidence: Arrows must correctly flow from Threat -> Prevention Barrier -> Top Event -> Mitigation Barrier -> Consequence. The shapes must contain text labels.

task_completion.description: Create a 5x5 Risk Matrix on the second page
task_completion.visual_evidence: A second page in the diagram containing a 5x5 grid (Likelihood vs Severity) with cells colored Green, Yellow, Orange, and Red, and 5 specific risks plotted within the grid.
File manager or save dialogs showing 'bowtie_hydrocarbon_release.drawio' and 'bowtie_hydrocarbon_release.pdf' being saved in the '~/Diagrams/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the diagrams.net (draw.io) graphical interface to create the diagrams.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the diagrams.net application window with the canvas, toolbars, and shape panels being actively used, rather than a text editor writing XML.

integrity.description: The agent exported the PDF using the application's export feature.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the diagrams.net 'File -> Export as -> PDF' menu or dialog being used, rather than a terminal command converting the file.

integrity.description: The agent built the diagram rather than downloading a pre-made solution.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory should show the step-by-step addition of shapes, colors, and text, rather than a sudden appearance of the completed diagram from a downloaded file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a 2-page diagram in diagrams.net. Page 1 must contain exactly 21 shapes: 1 Top Event (orange, #FF8800), 5 Threats (red, #FF4444), 5 Prevention Barriers (blue, #4488CC), 5 Consequences (dark red, #CC2222), and 5 Mitigation Barriers (green, #44AA44). Page 2 must contain a 5x5 Risk Matrix. The final files must be saved to /home/ga/Diagrams/bowtie_hydrocarbon_release.drawio and exported to /home/ga/Diagrams/bowtie_hydrocarbon_release.pdf.
